LanguageData.GuestCheapVendingmachine.stages.0.descri: That was a cheap vending machine.
LanguageData.GuestCheapVendingmachine.stages.0.label: cheap vendingmachine
LanguageData.GuestExpensiveVendingmachine.stages.0.de: I had to pay a lot at a vending machine.
LanguageData.GuestFreeVendingmachine.stages.0.descrip: Did not have to pay anything at a vending machine.
LanguageData.GuestFreeVendingmachine.stages.0.label: free vendingmachine
